oldContent: Remote OK Human Resources Generalist CoberonChronos <p>Our client is a medical technology company that develops, manufactures, sells, and services state-of-the-art nuclear medicine imaging systems. Their digital imaging platforms are used by healthcare sites worldwide and serve as the foundation for next-generation imaging and therapy-guiding applications, combining advanced hardware design with proprietary software and algorithms to deliver imaging at exceptional speed, low radiation dose, and superior image quality.</p><p>The company operates with a remote-first US team supported by an international headquarters, offering the opportunity to work in a fast-paced, innovative medtech environment.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p>Requirement</p><ul><li><strong>Experience</strong>: 3+ years in an HR Generalist, People Operations, or HR Business Partner role, with a strong focus on full-cycle recruitment</li><li><strong>Knowledge</strong>: Solid understanding of US federal and state labor laws, payroll basics, and benefits administration</li><li><strong>Systems</strong>: Familiarity with HRIS platforms</li><li><strong>Communication</strong>: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to build trust across all levels</li><li><strong>Education</strong>: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field</li><li><strong>Global Mindset</strong>: Experience working with a remote international headquarters</li></ul><p><br></p><p>Responsibilities</p><p>Talent Acquisition (Recruitment)</p><ul><li><strong>Full-Cycle Recruitin</strong>g: Manage the end-to-end recruitment process for various departments, including intake meetings, sourcing, screening, scheduling, interviewing, and offer negotiation</li><li><strong>Candidate Experienc</strong>e: Ensure a smooth, professional, and positive experience for all candidates throughout the interview process</li><li><strong>Pipeline &amp; Sourcin</strong>g: Proactively build talent pipelines and source candidates through various channels (LinkedIn, job boards, networking)</li></ul><p>People Operations &amp; Employee Experience</p><ul><li><strong>Onboarding &amp; Offboardin</strong>g: Lead the US new-hire orientation process to ensure a welcoming and informative experience. Manage the offboarding procedure</li><li><strong>HRIS Managemen</strong>t: Maintain and update the HR Information System (HRIS) and electronic personnel records to ensure data integrity and confidentiality</li><li><strong>Performance Managemen</strong>t: Support and administer the company's performance review cycles, goal setting, and continuous feedback processes</li><li><strong>Culture &amp; Engagemen</strong>t: Act as a champion of company culture, organizing team events, initiatives, and programs that foster employee engagement and retention</li></ul><p>Benefits, Compensation &amp; Compliance</p><ul><li><strong>Benefits Administratio</strong>n: Manage US employee benefits programs (health, 401k, PTO, etc.), including open enrollment and acting as the main point of contact for employee inquiries</li><li><strong>Compensatio</strong>n: Assist in administering compensation plans and ensuring they remain competitive in the market</li><li><strong>HR Complianc</strong>e: Maintain deep knowledge of U.S. federal, State, and local employment laws. oldContent: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Hyphen Connect Limited: Lead Product Designer (Crypto Exchange) Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Malaysia </p> <div class="job__description body"><div><p>We are working with a decentralised exchange which looks to innovate on providing the best of CEXs and DEXs, focusing on building a safe, simple and scalable platform for trading. They differentiate themselves by offering institutional level systems and support whilst remaining on-chain and decentralised.</p><br><p>As a Lead Product Designer, you will spearhead and implement comprehensive design initiatives for medium to large-scale projects. Your primary responsibility will be to create pixel-perfect designs that enhance the user experience across multiple platforms, including iOS, Android, web, and mobile web. You will play a vital role in maintaining the brand’s visual consistency and accessibility by developing reusable design templates and overseeing a cohesive Design Language System (DLS).</p><br><h3>Key Responsibilities:</h3><br><ul><br><li>Lead and manage design projects from conception to production for medium to large scales.</li><br><li>Craft platform-optimized, pixel-perfect designs tailored for iOS, Android, web, and mobile web.</li><br><li>Develop, maintain, and refine reusable design templates, ensuring they align with company's DLS.</li><br><li>Create detailed specifications and redlines that reference the DLS to guide product implementation.</li><br><li>Review and ensure all design assets accurately render in products and adhere to brand standards.</li><br><li>Collaborate effectively with engineering, product, QA, and research teams to ensure design consistency.</li><br><li>Design new components and icons, contributing to the ongoing evolution of the DLS, with a focus on brand alignment and accessibility.</li><br><li>Maintain documentation of design workflows and processes, ensuring comprehensive design records.</li><br><li>Conduct user research to better understand needs and behaviors.</li><br></ul><br><h3>Your Experience &amp; Skills:</h3><br><ul><br><li>Minimum of 6 years in product design, including at least 3 years in a leadership role managing complex, cross-platform projects.</li><br><li>Strong focus on detail with a passion for achieving pixel-perfect design.</li><br><li>Significant experience managing and working within design systems, tokens, and variable structures.</li><br><li>Proficient in using Figma’s components, shared libraries, and branching functionalities.</li><br><li>Proven experience in managing stakeholders and effectively collaborating with product, engineering, and QA teams.</li><br><li>Expert in Figma, with possible proficiency in Sketch, Photoshop, and Illustrator.</li><br><li>Highly self-driven, solution-oriented, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment.</li><br><li>Demonstrated ability to build a product’s UI/UX from the ground up.</li><br></ul><br><p>#LI-REMOTE</p></div></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hyphen-connect-limited-lead-product-designer-crypto-exchange">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hyphen-connect-limited-lead-product-designer-crypto-exchange</a></p> seeking individuals passionate about performance advertising.</p> <p>Aventra Media is a Digital Media &amp; Performance Marketing company focused on helping brands grow through data-driven advertising strategies and high-performance digital media systems.</p> <p>We specialize in building Growth Marketing solutions, optimizing paid advertising, expanding brand awareness, and increasing conversions Content team to develop high-conversion campaigns<br>Manage advertising budgets and optimize performance based on growth targets<br>Prepare periodic reports and propose solutions to improve advertising effectiveness</p> <p>REQUIREMENTS</p> <p>Practical experience with Meta Ads and/or Google Ads<br>Thorough understanding of Performance Marketing and the digital advertising ecosystem<br>Ability to read and understand data Analyze and make optimal decisions based on actual performance<br>Proficient in basic tracking and analytics tools<br>Ability to work independently in a remote environment<br>Strong time management and communication skills<br>Proactive, responsible, and long-term career-oriented<br>Preference will be given to candidates who have implemented large advertising budgets or have experience in international markets</p> <p&g

Remote, Part time, flexible hours - Assistant and Content Manager Anywhere in the World Wyoming Virtual Assistant All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5744/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Boulder, Colorado <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://truepublicity.com">https://truepublicity.com</a> </p> <p>Hey guys.</p> <p> This is the perfect gig for an undergrad student </p> <ul> <li>Fully remote</li> <li>Flexible hours</li> <li>Part time - (Won't take away from your studies)</li> <li>Paid training included</li> <li>Good pay</li> </ul> <p>You'll be doing some basic virtual assistant computer work, some Wordpress / content management but it's easy to do, and training and help will be available.</p> <p>Please fill in the application form at <a href="https://tally.so/r/1A5E2l">https://tally.so/r/1A5E2l</a>&nbsp;</p> <p>Looking forward to hearing from you!</p> <p>Kind regards</p> <p>David</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager</a></p> Mon, 06 Jul 2026 10:45:59 +0000 Wed, 05 Aug 2026 10:45:59 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager Creative Force: SaaS Product Support Jedi – Remote, EMEA Anywhere in the World Berkshire SaaS Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0074/5226/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Creative Force <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.creativeforce.team/">https://www.creativeforce.team/</a> </p> <p>We’re on the hunt for a sharp, self-driven SaaS pro who’s as comfortable navigating staging environments as they are navigating human conversations.</p> <p>Our EMEA client base is growing fast and we need someone who can keep up. Our software isn’t your average plug-and-play; it has a steep learning curve so you’ll need to be technically savvy while also being the kind of person clients genuinely enjoy talking to. If you’ve got SaaS in your DNA, thrive in async/remote environments, and can juggle multiple threads without breaking a sweat — keep reading.</p> <h2>The role</h2> <p>You’ll join a lean, high-performing global support team working across two SaaS products, Award Force and Good Grants. Day to day you’ll be communicating with colleagues and clients across countries, cultures, and time zones.</p> <p>Support happens across email tickets, phone, and 1-1 Zoom calls. Once you’ve leveled up on product knowledge, you’ll run onboarding sessions and client meetings covering issue resolution, best practices, and product adoption.</p> <p>You’ll also be hands-on with bug testing and reporting, feeding considered feedback to our product teams— always pushing to make our products better.</p> <p>We have a startup mindset. We experiment with new tools, iterate on processes, and move fast. Got a great idea? Pitch it. We’re not big on bureaucracy, only results. We don’t expect you to be a slave to your chair but flexibility is a must.</p> <h2>You’ll need to tick these boxes</h2> <ul> <li><strong>You’re based in the UTC +1 or +2 timezone range.</strong>&nbsp;This is non-negotiable. Our EMEA team and clients operate in this window and we don’t allow shift work. If you live outside this range, this one’s not for you</li> <li>2+ years of professional experience, ideally in a SaaS support or client-facing role</li> <li>Native-level English fluency (bilingual? Even better!)</li> <li>Terms like HTML, CSS, JS, API, integrations, dev console, staging &amp; production environments, GitHub repos, and database queries don’t make you flinch. You don’t need to write code, but you need to get it</li> <li>You’ve got exceptional interpersonal and communication skills—written and verbal</li> <li>Client calls energise you. Four to five Zoom meetings a day? Bring it on</li> <li>You’re a natural problem solver who loves helping others untangle theirs</li> <li>Your writing is clean, well-structured, and detail-oriented</li> <li>You’re curious by nature and love learning new things</li> <li>You’re not allergic to upselling or fielding “sales-y” questions</li> <li>You’re organised and process-driven. Multiple tools for different workflows? No problem — you thrive in that setup</li> <li>You’re self-motivated and independent, but you also value being part of a tight-knit team</li> <li>Remote work isn’t just something you dabble in—it’s where you do your best work. You’ve got fast, reliable internet and a distraction-free workspace ready to go</li> </ul> <h2>Responsibilities</h2> <p><strong>Product support<br></strong></p> <ul> <li>Go deep on product knowledge through self-driven learning—become the expert</li> <li>Be the first point of contact on all inbound support via email/tickets, phone, and eventually live chat</li> <li>Run 1-1 Zoom sessions with clients for technical consultation and query resolution</li> <li>Maintain our consistently impressive first-reply-time metric (yeah, we’re proud of it)</li> <li>Provide technically accurate responses backed by hands-on testing of scenarios</li> <li>Collaborate with engineering to squash bugs and keep clients in the loop with timely updates</li> <li>Spot patterns in user issues and flag them for product improvement</li> </ul> <p><strong>Be seriously good with clients</strong></p> <ul> <li>Speed matters. Respond quickly and decisively</li> <li>Listen deeply—get to the root of the issue and own it until it’s resolved</li> <li>Treat every client interaction with genuine respect and appreciation</li> <li>Build trusting, long-term relationships rooted in honesty and transparency</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-saas-product-support-jedi-remote-emea">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-saas-product-support-jedi-remote-emea</a></p> Mon, 06 Jul 2026 09:07:40 +0000 Wed, 05 Aug 2026 09:07:40 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-saas-product-support-jedi-remote-emea https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-saas-product-support-jedi-remote-emea Hyphen Connect Limited: Lead Product Designer (Crypto Exchange) Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Malaysia </p&g
